_exempt: <!-- PRIMARY-SOURCE-EXEMPT: reason=QA cert fixture grounded in Lothaire (2002) ISBN 978-0-521-81220-7 Ch.2 (Sturmian aperiodicity) and Hardy+Wright (2008) ISBN 978-0-19-921986-5. -->
description: s_alpha for alpha=sqrt(2)-1 has no period T with 1<=T<=50. Verified over 100-term window. Contrasts with (RLLR)^inf which has period 4.
